summary: Testing P0 features: Search page attachment UI and Auto-freight calculation in approve_rfq. Found and fixed a critical NoneType bug preventing RFQ approval. All backend tests pass (12/12). Frontend attachment UI code verified in search.tsx.

fixed_issues.issue: NoneType error when product.specifications is null - prevented RFQ approval
fixed_issues.fix: Changed `product.get('specifications', {})` to `product.get('specifications') or {}` in server.py lines 1119-1131 and 3673-3680
fixed_issues.priority: CRITICAL - was blocking all RFQ approvals with null specifications

integration_issues.issue: Clicking Search tab doesn't visually switch from Calculator content - needs UI verification on actual device
integration_issues.note: This is a web testing limitation - React Native Web may behave differently than native

critical_code_review_comments: search.tsx Lines 1064-1140: Attachment UI (Camera, Gallery, Document buttons) properly implemented with data-testid attributes
search.tsx Lines 246-348: Attachment helper functions (takePhoto, pickImage, pickDocument) correctly implemented with expo-image-picker and expo-document-picker
search.tsx Line 407-411: Attachments are correctly passed to cart via addToCart function with base64 encoding
search.tsx Line 416: searchAttachments are properly cleared when modal closes
server.py Lines 3666-3700: Auto-freight calculation implemented correctly - calculates freight when delivery_location is provided and no freight exists

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - UI testing limited due to tab navigation complexity

seed_data_creation: Used existing RFQs from database for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features verified: 1) Search page attachment UI code exists and is properly implemented in search.tsx (Camera, Gallery, Document buttons with data-testids). 2) Auto-freight calculation works in approve_rfq endpoint - verified via backend tests. Bug fix applied for NoneType error when specifications is null. The Search tab is integrated within the Products/Calculator page as a tab toggle.

findings: Attachment list with remove functionality - Lines 1097-1118
Attachments cleared on modal close - Line 416

response_verification.shipping_cost: Calculated based on weight and distance
response_verification.freight_details: Contains destination_pincode, total_weight_kg, distance_km, freight_rate_per_kg, freight_charges, auto_calculated flag

bug_fix_applied.issue: approve_rfq endpoint returning 500 Internal Server Error
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: When product.specifications is explicitly null (not missing), `product.get('specifications', {})` returns None instead of {}. Calling .get() on None causes AttributeError
bug_fix_applied.fix_applied: Changed to `product.get('specifications') or {}` pattern which handles both missing and null values
